insight: Voice mute "not working" reports are often icon confusion: ChatControl blocks voice by cancelling packets server-side, which shows no muted-mic icon (Plasmo only shows the icon for entries in its own MuteManager storage; Simple Voice Chat has no mute icon API at all). Ask whether a second account actually hears the muted player before treating it as an enforcement bug.

VoiceChatHook.register() runs only from onPluginStart, so enabling Voice_Chat.Enabled in settings.yml requires a full server restart, not /chc reload; success is confirmed by the startup line "Note: Hooked into Plasmo Voice to bridge mute state". Mirror entries ChatControl writes into Plasmo's MuteManager carry the reason "Muted by ChatControl", which is how they are told apart from admin /vmute entries.
